workbook.name: (Active) 2021 Q3 Dealer Buying Event
workbook.sourcePath: Data/Q3 Buyer/(Active) 2021 Q3 Dealer Buying Event.twb

calculatedFields.caption: Region
calculatedFields.formula:
IF [Sales Area] = "Canada" THEN "Canada" ELSEIF 
[Sales Area] = "United States of America" THEN "USA" ELSE [Macro Area] END

calculatedFields.caption: Measure for Rank
calculatedFields.formula:
Case [Parameters].[Total Orders Parameter]
WHEN "Order $ (Accending)" THEN -[Order $]
WHEN "Order Units (Accending)" THEN -[Order Quantity]
WHEN "Order $ (Decending)" THEN [Order $]
WHEN "Order Units (Decending)" THEN [Order Quantity]
END

calculatedFields.caption: Rank Filter
calculatedFields.formula: IF [Calculation1] <= [Parameters].[Rank Sort Measure (copy)] THEN "Yes" ELSE "No" END

calculatedFields.caption: Region
calculatedFields.formula:
IF [Sales Area] = "Canada" THEN "Canada" ELSEIF 
[Sales Area] = "United States of America" THEN "USA" ELSE [Macro Area] END

zones.text:
*Data in this report was pulled out of SO99 on 9/14/2021 and represents Dealer Orders  through 9/11/2021. This data does not include DSS orders that have not been uploaded to SAP.
*This report includes all styles from "2021 July Core", "2022 Spring", "2022 Summer,  "2021 Winter Chase", and "2021 Fall Chase"  with Introduction Status  "New" in Flex PLM.
* Order Quantity   represents orders placed by dealers at the regional DCs. This data does not account for Back Orders or Cancelations, thus they will still be included in the data.
*Order $ (USD)  represents Order Quantity out of SO99 priced at U.S. Dealer Net pulled from SAP.

Data Detail
Q3 Event  2021 Launch Results
Updated Through 9/11/2021
Utilize filters to narrow down data in table below.
To expand hierarchies click the plus sign in the headers.
To export data click a data cell in the table and then select, download, crosstab .
